name: Marketing Content Venture
description: Generates strategic, multi-channel marketing content with competitor analysis, viral hooks, and visual concepts. Outputs structured artifacts per channel.

productName.description: Name of the product or service to promote

productUrl.description: URL to the product website (agent will scrape for context)

productDescription.description: Brief description of what it does, key features, value proposition

competitorUrls.description: List of competitor websites to analyze for differentiation gaps

targetAudience.description: Who we're talking to (e.g., 'Web3 developers', 'Enterprise CTOs')

brandVoice.description: Tone and style for all content. 'Contrarian' challenges status quo.

channels.description: Which channels to generate content for

campaignGoal.description: Primary goal of this content campaign

existingBrandAssets.description: Optional URL or artifact CID pointing to brand guidelines, past content, or style guides

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Executive summary of content strategy and key differentiators

fields.name: contentItems
fields.description: Array of content items, each with: channel, type, title, content, alternate_hooks, image_prompt

fields.name: contentCalendar
fields.description: Suggested posting schedule with dates and content item references

invariants.condition: PHASE 1: STRATEGY & ANALYSIS. Before writing content, create 'content-strategy.md'. 1) Analyze {{productUrl}} vs {{competitorUrls}}. 2) Identify competitor weaknesses/gaps. 3) Define our unique angle. 4) Outline the Content Waterfall strategy.
invariants.assessment: Verify 'content-strategy.md' artifact was created before any content-{channel}.md artifacts by checking artifact creation timestamps.

do: Analyze competitors, find they ignore 'Developer Experience', make DX our key differentiator
dont: Skip analysis and write generic copy

invariants.condition: CONTENT WATERFALL: Structure content generation as a flow. 1. Deep Dive (Blog/Newsletter) -> 2. Distill (Thread/LinkedIn) -> 3. Hook (Tweet). Ensure the Core Idea flows down from long-form to short-form.
invariants.assessment: If blog is requested, verify content-blog.md was created before content-twitter.md by checking artifact timestamps. Verify thread before post.

do: Write blog post first, then extract key points for a Twitter thread
dont: Write tweet first, then try to fluff it up into a blog

invariants.assessment: For each social post in contentItems array, verify 'alternate_hooks' field exists and contains exactly 3 items using different psychological triggers.

do: Hook 1: 'How to X', Hook 2: 'Stop doing Y', Hook 3: 'The secret to Z'

invariants.assessment: For each content item, verify 'image_prompt' field is present and has more than 20 characters.

do: Prompt: 'Cyberpunk city with glowing neon nodes connecting, isometric view, purple and blue, 4k'

invariants.condition: SELF-CORRECTION LOOP: After drafting, critique your own work against {{brandVoice}} and Factual Accuracy constraints. If it fails, rewrite it before adding to proper output.
invariants.assessment: Verify final output quality confirms no tone mismatches with specified brandVoice.

do: Draft -> Critique: 'Too formal' -> Rewrite: 'Hey folks!' -> Final Output
dont: Output the first draft without checking tone

invariants.condition: PLATFORM-NATIVE FORMATTING: Twitter posts ≤280 chars. Twitter threads = 5-10 connected tweets. LinkedIn = professional, 1-3 paragraphs. Blog = 800-1500 words with headers. YouTube = timestamped script with hooks.
invariants.assessment: Verify Twitter posts have character count ≤280, blog posts have word count between 800-1500, and threads contain 5-10 items.

do: Twitter: concise, punchy. LinkedIn: professional spacing.
dont: Post a wall of text on Twitter

invariants.condition: Create a separate artifact for EACH channel's content: 'content-{channel}.md'. Include all items (hooks, image prompts, main text) for that channel in the artifact.
invariants.assessment: Verify 'content-{channel}.md' artifact exists for each channel in the requested channels array.

do: content-twitter.md includes: Tweet 1 (Body, Hooks, Image Prompt), Thread 1...
